name: four_corners_minigame
description: Adds individual permissions for every Four Corners subcommand.
globals: (function() { var colors = [{ id: 'red', name: '&cRed', material: 'RED_WOOL' }, { id: 'blue', name: '&9Blue', material: 'BLUE_WOOL' }, { id: 'yellow', name: '&eYellow', material: 'YELLOW_WOOL' }, { id: 'lime', name: '&aLime', material: 'LIME_WOOL' }]; var WALL_HEIGHT = 6; function arg(args, i) { try { if (args && typeof args.size === 'function' && args.size() > i) return String(args.get(i)); } catch (e) {} try { if (args && args.length > i) return String(args[i]); } catch (e2) {} return null; } function num(v, def) { var n = parseInt(v, 10); return isNaN(n) ? def : n; } function getColorById(id) { for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) if (colors[i].id === id) return colors[i]; return null; } function quadrant(arena, x, z) { var dx = x - arena.x; var dz = z - arena.z; if (dx < 0 && dz < 0) return colors[0]; if (dx >= 0 && dz < 0) return colors[1]; if (dx < 0 && dz >= 0) return colors[2]; return colors[3]; } function worldOf(arena) { return arena ? server.getWorld(arena.world) : null; } function wallBounds(a) { var half = Math.floor(a.size / 2); return { minX: a.x - half - 1, maxX: a.x + half, minZ: a.z - half - 1, maxZ: a.z + half, topY: a.y + (a.wallHeight || WALL_HEIGHT) + 1 }; } function eachWallBlock(a, fn) { var b = wallBounds(a); var wh = a.wallHeight || WALL_HEIGHT; for (var yy = a.y + 1; yy <= a.y + wh + 1; yy++) { for (var z = b.minZ; z <= b.maxZ; z++) { fn(b.minX, yy, z); fn(b.maxX, yy, z); } for (var x = b.minX + 1; x < b.maxX; x++) { fn(x, yy, b.minZ); fn(x, yy, b.maxZ); } } } function inArenaBlock(state, b) { var a = state.arena; if (!a || !b) return false; try { if (b.getWorld().getName() !== a.world) return false; } catch (e) { return false; } var bounds = wallBounds(a); return b.getY() >= a.y && b.getY() <= bounds.topY && b.getX() >= bounds.minX && b.getX() <= bounds.maxX && b.getZ() >= bounds.minZ && b.getZ() <= bounds.maxZ; } function captureArena(state, world, x, y, z, size) { var half = Math.floor(size / 2); var arena = { world: world.getName(), x: x, y: y, z: z, size: size, wallHeight: WALL_HEIGHT, snapshots: [] }; var seen = {}; function add(xx, yy, zz) { var key = xx + ',' + yy + ',' + zz; if (seen[key]) return; seen[key] = true; arena.snapshots.push(world.getBlockAt(xx, yy, zz).captureState()); } for (var dx = -half; dx < half; dx++) { for (var dz = -half; dz < half; dz++) add(x + dx, y, z + dz); } eachWallBlock(arena, add); state.arena = arena; } function buildWalls(state) { var a = state.arena; if (!a) return false; var world = worldOf(a); if (!world) return false; var topY = a.y + (a.wallHeight || WALL_HEIGHT) + 1; eachWallBlock(a, function(x, y, z) { world.getBlockAt(x, y, z).setType(y === topY ? 'GLOWSTONE' : 'GLASS', false); }); return true; } function paintPlatform(state) { var a = state.arena; if (!a) return false; var world = worldOf(a); if (!world) return false; var half = Math.floor(a.size / 2); for (var dx = -half; dx < half; dx++) { for (var dz = -half; dz < half; dz++) { var c = quadrant(a, a.x + dx, a.z + dz); world.getBlockAt(a.x + dx, a.y, a.z + dz).setType(c.material, false); } } buildWalls(state); return true; } function setColor(state, colorId, material) { var a = state.arena; if (!a) return false; var world = worldOf(a); if (!world) return false; var half = Math.floor(a.size / 2); for (var dx = -half; dx < half; dx++) { for (var dz = -half; dz < half; dz++) { var c = quadrant(a, a.x + dx, a.z + dz); if (c.id === colorId) world.getBlockAt(a.x + dx, a.y, a.z + dz).setType(material, false); } } buildWalls(state); return true; } function restoreOriginal(state) { var a = state.arena; if (!a || !a.snapshots) return false; for (var i = a.snapshots.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { try { a.snapshots[i].restore(false); } catch (e) {} } return true; } function arenaSpawn(state, yAdd) { var a = state.arena; var world = worldOf(a); if (!a || !world) return null; return world.location(a.x + 0.5, a.y + yAdd, a.z + 0.5); } function joinedPlayers(state) { var out = []; for (var name in state.joined) { if (state.joined[name]) { var p = server.getPlayer(name); if (p) out.push(p); } } return out; } function aliveNames(state) { var out = []; for (var name in state.game.alive) if (state.game.alive[name]) out.push(name); return out; } function broadcastGame(state, msg) { server.broadcast('&6[Four Corners] &r' + msg); } function restorePlayers(state) { for (var name in state.game.prevModes) { var p = server.getPlayer(name); if (p) { try { p.setGameMode(state.game.prevModes[name]); } catch (e) {} try { p.setAllowFlight(!!state.game.prevFlight[name]); } catch (e2) {} } } } function finishGame(state, winner) { if (!state.game.active) return; state.game.active = false; paintPlatform(state); restorePlayers(state); var spawn = arenaSpawn(state, 2); for (var n in state.joined) { var p = server.getPlayer(n); if (p && spawn) { try { p.teleport(spawn); } catch (e) {} } } if (winner) { broadcastGame(state, '&a' + winner + ' wins!'); var wp = server.getPlayer(winner); if (wp) { try { wp.playSound('ENTITY_PLAYER_LEVELUP', 1.0, 1.0); } catch (e2) {} } } else { broadcastGame(state, '&cGame ended with no winner.'); } state.game.alive = {}; state.game.prevModes = {}; state.game.prevFlight = {}; state.game.phase = 'idle'; } function eliminate(state, player, reason) { if (!state.game.active || !player) return; var name = player.getName(); if (!state.game.alive[name]) return; state.game.alive[name] = false; player.sendMessage('&cYou lost! &7' + reason); try { player.playSound('ENTITY_GENERIC_EXPLODE', 0.6, 1.6); } catch (e) {} try { player.setGameMode('SPECTATOR'); } catch (e2) {} var sp = arenaSpawn(state, 6); if (sp) { try { player.teleport(sp); } catch (e3) {} } var alive = aliveNames(state); if (alive.length <= 1) finishGame(state, alive.length === 1 ? alive[0] : null); else broadcastGame(state, '&c' + name + ' is out! &e' + alive.length + ' players remain.'); } function chooseColor(state) { var available = []; for (var i = 0; i < colors.length; i++) if (colors[i].id !== state.game.lastRemoved) available.push(colors[i]); return available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)]; } function tick(state) { if (!state.game.active || !state.arena) return; var now = Date.now(); if (now < state.game.nextAction) return; var world = worldOf(state.arena); if (!world) return; if (state.game.phase === 'safe') { var c = chooseColor(state); state.game.lastRemoved = c.id; state.game.removed = c.id; setColor(state, c.id, 'AIR'); world.playSoundAt(state.arena.x, state.arena.y + 1, state.arena.z, 'ENTITY_ENDERMAN_TELEPORT', 1.0, 0.8); broadcastGame(state, c.name + ' &fhas disappeared!'); state.game.phase = 'removed'; state.game.nextAction = now + state.settings.fallMillis; } else if (state.game.phase === 'removed') { paintPlatform(state); state.game.round++; world.playSoundAt(state.arena.x, state.arena.y + 1, state.arena.z, 'BLOCK_NOTE_BLOCK_PLING', 1.0, 1.3); var delay = Math.max(2500, state.settings.warningMillis - state.game.round * 400); broadcastGame(state, '&aThe floor is back. &eNext color falls soon!'); state.game.phase = 'safe'; state.game.nextAction = now + delay; } } return { colors: colors, joined: {}, arena: null, settings: { warningMillis: 6500, fallMillis: 3500 }, game: { active: false, alive: {}, prevModes: {}, prevFlight: {}, phase: 'idle', nextAction: 0, removed: null, lastRemoved: null, round: 0 }, helpers: { arg: arg, num: num, getColorById: getColorById, captureArena: captureArena, paintPlatform: paintPlatform, restoreOriginal: restoreOriginal, arenaSpawn: arenaSpawn, joinedPlayers: joinedPlayers, aliveNames: aliveNames, broadcastGame: broadcastGame, finishGame: finishGame, eliminate: eliminate, tick: tick, inArenaBlock: inArenaBlock } }; })

commands.label: four_corners
